post_rendered:
Water. Earth. Fire. Air.

Long ago, the four nations lived together in harmony. Then, everything changed when the Fire Nation attacked. Only the Avatar, master of all four elements, could stop them, but when the world needed him most, he vanished. A hundred years passed and my brother and I discovered the new Avatar, an airbender named Aang, and although his airbending skills are great, he has a lot to learn before he’s ready to save anyone. But I believe Aang can save the world.

Welcome to Mafia Game 210: Avatar TLA

If you are not alive in this game, please do not post in this thread.

Rules
  • Do not post if you are not participating in this game
  • Do not post at night
  • Do not talk about this game to anyone outside of this thread except the mods and assigned discussion areas
  • Do not edit/delete posts
  • Do not conceal text with transparent colors. Hide tags with proper text are acceptable
  • No posting after you are dead
  • Please be respectful and mature
  • Do not quote/mock any PMs or role PMs, whether in this thread or outside of it
  • If you require any clarifications, please reply in your role PM.

Voting/Hanging
  • Post votes in bold in the format “Vote: <player>”
  • Do not hide votes inside hide tags
  • You may vote for no hang to occur by voting “Vote: No Hang”
  • You may unvote by stating “Unvote”
  • You may only vote for one player at a time, so any votes will automatically unvote you for your previous vote
  • If a majority of players vote for a player, that player will be hanged.
  • If a deadline is reached, the player with the most votes will be hanged.
  • In case of a tie for highest votes upon reaching deadline, the first player to have reached that number of votes will be hanged. In vote counts, the player currently set to be hanged upon reaching deadline will always be the first listed player.

Timings
  • This game will use the classic Day/Twilight/Night cycle
  • Talking is allowed during the Day time
  • Talking is disallowed during the Twilight/Night times
  • Daytalk is enabled (players given an external chat are permitted to talk during the day)
  • Days will last 240 hours (10 days), or upon the conclusion of a vote
  • Nights will last 48 hours (2 days), or upon the conclusion of all night actions
  • If a player does not submit a night action by the night deadline, no action will be performed
  • Players will be PM prodded upon 48 hours of inactivity, and replaced upon 3 PM prods

Setup
Setup is semi-open, based on the NewD3 format. Which version of NewD3 will not be specified. Role PMs include flavor text, feel free to reply to role PMs with any clarifying questions.

Significant Events

  • Day 1 - kevinmathz: Bato, Warrior of the Southern Water Tribe (Vanilla Townie) is pronounced dead. (#528)

  • Day 2 - asdf334: Yue, Princess of the Northern Water Tribe (Vanilla Townie) is pronounced dead. (#819)
  • Night 2 - ARay10: Bumi, King of Omashu of the Earth Kingdom (Vanilla Townie) has been murdered. (#820)

post_rendered:
Night 0: Aang, the Avatar of the Air Nomads, has been found dead.

The suspects were clear, given the intense burn scars all around the body. As the world mourned, the last few warriors of the Water Tribes and the Earth Kingdom decided to face off against the remaining members of the Fire Nation. After all, the Fire Nation had nothing if not for their pride.

The fate of the world was left in the hands of 9 representatives. Whether they could come to a peaceful resolution or whether the entirety of their treaty would burn to cinders... is left to be seen.

Rule Addendum: Your role PMs are to be kept secret at all means. You may claim a role, but no flavor text may be revealed. Breaking this rule will result in an immediate mod-kill.

Welcome to Mafia Game 210. All players have confirmed, so I'll go ahead and open the floor up for Day 1.

Voting is enabled, either a majority of players (5 votes) or highest upon deadline (07/23, 10:00 PM Eastern) will be hanged.

post_rendered:
Hi guys, I'm kevinmathz.

PSA: If you haven't already I highly recommend you read a past game, preferably with a similar setup, like Game 182 for example. Helps out quite a bit

Sometime in the day we should mason code. Example of a mason code: M~ ~~~~n~~e ~~ ~~~i~~~~h~, ~~d ~ ~~ ~ ~~~o~. ~~ ~~r~~e~ ~~ ~d~~~.

When you claim mason and your partner is dead, enter the missing blanks. For example, if I was mason and I sent the above message to zdtsd with the blanks filled in, he could claim mason and enter my blanks as "My username is kevinmathz, and I am a mason. My partner is zdtsd."

This way, when one mason dies and the other is about to be hanged, the other mason can claim and be cleared like that, and lead town. Masons can also soft.

You guys should all do that kind of stuff, called "coding". I urge you all to make good codes in case we ever need it.

Now, some more PR-specific advice:

Town Cop
Your job is to help us find the Mafia. If you exist, that means if you claim, Mafia knows the exact setup, and in either setup, you don't get a report after you claim unless Mafia Roleblocker is dead and Doctor is still alive. As a result, keep from claiming until you at least get a mafia report.

I would suggest investigating unreadable people, to make it not as hard to have to make reads later.

Town Tracker
Your job is to help us find the Mafia. You know there is a Mafia Rolecop. Keep from claiming until you at least get a mafia report, because there is a 50-50 you die the next night. Note that if someone visits two people in one night, they are confirmed scum.

I would suggest investigating unreadable people, to make it not as hard to have to make reads later.

Town Doctor
Your job is to save the power roles and Vanilla Townies. If you claim, you die the next night, so as a result, don't claim until neccessary. In addition, if tracker claims, you know there is a Mafia Rolecop and should always save Tracker. If nobody dies one night, you know you successfully saved whoever you saved (or Mafia is bad and didn't kill, which is unlikely)

Town Friendly Neighbor
Your job is to clear yourself to as many people as you can. You know there must be a Mafia Rolecop, so you should soft that. Also, if people are visited by Friendly Neighbor, they should not make it so obvious until endgame but instead townread the friendly neighbor.

Town Jailkeeper
You know that if there is no kill some night, then the person you jailed is mafia or the kill target (or Mafia is bad and didn't kill, which is unlikely). As a result, you should either protect your townread or jailkeep a scumread. I would do the latter if I was jailkeeper.

Town Mason
Make a good Mason code. Only claim if you are about to be hanged or you have a good reason to do so, e.g. someone else claims PR.

Mafia Goon
Please out yourself and your partner.

Mafia Roleblocker
Here's your strategy. Read it and then proceed to out your partner or pester them to out you.

Mafia Rolecop
Please get feedback'd by the Dark Archon. Thanq


A few more notes:
- If someone claims doctor after the cop is outed and no Roleblocker is alive nor has anyone been saved, they are not necessarily town. They might be goon, due to setups A1 and C1.
- Similarly, if a jailkeeper claims, then if a tracker claims afterward, there is no way to confirm the legitimacy of the claim. NO WAY AT ALL.

My Mason code is ~ ~o~ ~~~ ~o~~~~b~~ m~~~~o~ ~~ ~~~~. M~ ~~~ ~~o~~ ~~~~ ~e~~ ~~ 29, ~~~ ~~ ~~o ~~o~~ ~~~~ ~~~~ ~~~ ~ 9.

kevinmathz wrote:
Hi guys, I'm kevinmathz.

PSA: If you haven't already I highly recommend you read a past game, preferably with a similar setup, like Game 182 for example. Helps out quite a bit

Sometime in the day we should mason code. Example of a mason code: M~ ~~~~n~~e ~~ ~~~i~~~~h~, ~~d ~ ~~ ~ ~~~o~. ~~ ~~r~~e~ ~~ ~d~~~.

When you claim mason and your partner is dead, enter the missing blanks. For example, if I was mason and I sent the above message to zdtsd with the blanks filled in, he could claim mason and enter my blanks as "My username is kevinmathz, and I am a mason. My partner is zdtsd."

This way, when one mason dies and the other is about to be hanged, the other mason can claim and be cleared like that, and lead town. Masons can also soft.

You guys should all do that kind of stuff, called "coding". I urge you all to make good codes in case we ever need it.

Now, some more PR-specific advice:

Town Cop
Your job is to help us find the Mafia. If you exist, that means if you claim, Mafia knows the exact setup, and in either setup, you don't get a report after you claim unless Mafia Roleblocker is dead and Doctor is still alive. As a result, keep from claiming until you at least get a mafia report.

I would suggest investigating unreadable people, to make it not as hard to have to make reads later.

Town Tracker
Your job is to help us find the Mafia. You know there is a Mafia Rolecop. Keep from claiming until you at least get a mafia report, because there is a 50-50 you die the next night. Note that if someone visits two people in one night, they are confirmed scum.

I would suggest investigating unreadable people, to make it not as hard to have to make reads later.

Town Doctor
Your job is to save the power roles and Vanilla Townies. If you claim, you die the next night, so as a result, don't claim until neccessary. In addition, if tracker claims, you know there is a Mafia Rolecop and should always save Tracker. If nobody dies one night, you know you successfully saved whoever you saved (or Mafia is bad and didn't kill, which is unlikely)

Town Friendly Neighbor
Your job is to clear yourself to as many people as you can. You know there must be a Mafia Rolecop, so you should soft that. Also, if people are visited by Friendly Neighbor, they should not make it so obvious until endgame but instead townread the friendly neighbor.

Town Jailkeeper
You know that if there is no kill some night, then the person you jailed is mafia or the kill target (or Mafia is bad and didn't kill, which is unlikely). As a result, you should either protect your townread or jailkeep a scumread. I would do the latter if I was jailkeeper.

Town Mason
Make a good Mason code. Only claim if you are about to be hanged or you have a good reason to do so, e.g. someone else claims PR.

Mafia Goon
Please out yourself and your partner.

Mafia Roleblocker
Here's your strategy. Read it and then proceed to out your partner or pester them to out you.

Mafia Rolecop
Please get feedback'd by the Dark Archon. Thanq


A few more notes:
- If someone claims doctor after the cop is outed and no Roleblocker is alive nor has anyone been saved, they are not necessarily town. They might be goon, due to setups A1 and C1.
- Similarly, if a jailkeeper claims, then if a tracker claims afterward, there is no way to confirm the legitimacy of the claim. NO WAY AT ALL.

My Mason code is ~ ~o~ ~~~ ~o~~~~b~~ m~~~~o~ ~~ ~~~~. M~ ~~~ ~~o~~ ~~~~ ~e~~ ~~ 29, ~~~ ~~ ~~o ~~o~~ ~~~~ ~~~~ ~~~ ~ 9.

Seeing the rampant pain and suffering in the humans, the Spirit World was ready to exterminate the entirety of the human race. However, the spirits of all previous Avatars pleaded for another chance for the human race. "Not all of the humans are so dangerous and murderous, there's inherent good within the human race" they beseeched to the spirits.

Every representative would have their identity hidden, and it was up to each individual to prove themselves worthy. post_rendered:
And so, after a long first day of debates and conversations that stretched on and on, it was clear that there would not be a simple resolution. The greed in the hearts of the Fire Nation members was unrelenting, and the heat from the arguments made it clear that to find a resolution, sacrifices must be made. To save humanity, the violence in the hearts of humanity must be purged.

With their identities hidden, the representatives struggled to detect the clever Fire Nation members that had hidden amongst them. After some long periods of indecision and awkwards moments of silence, a sudden spurry of outbursts led to several accusations and distrust spreading to all the representatives. As the group's suspicion spread from one member to another, an accusation from one of the quieter members shifted the group's distrust. Dragging their body to the stand, they interrogated the representative for a final defense. Frustrated at everyone's incompetence, they denounced the entire lot, leaving them with five words:

"IT WAS ALL A TEST"

With those final words spoken, the others watched as the spirits flowed through their body, jaws dropped in awe as they experienced the flow of life in streams of blinding light flood through the body's orifices, and then gradually disappear. As the limp body fell to the floor, the hood masking them fell away, revealing their identity, and a single note:

"I got jmo honorable mention in 2020. My jmo score this year is 29, and my jmo score last year was a 9."

Day 1 - kevinmathz: Bato, Warrior of the Southern Water Tribe (Vanilla Townie) is pronounced dead.

It is now Night 1. Players with Night Actions, please PM me to submit your actions. Night 1 will end on July 25th, 10 PM Eastern. Do not talk in this thread until Day 2 has started.

post_rendered:
It was a rough night for everyone. Regardless of how close any representative might have been to the Avatar personally, the death of the Avatar and the knowledge that there would never be another Avatar was a tremendous hit to anyone. And if that wasn't enough, they slept in close proximity to the Spirit World, with dooming threat of the extinction of humanity if they failed. Many of the representatives tossed and turned in their restless sleep. In the worst cases, some of them never got sleep at all. Too burdened by the loss, unable to rest in the death rows of the Spirit World, one decided to get up and seek out any information they could. Sneaking around in the middle of the night, they tried to ascertain any information they could. Too focused on what was in front of them, they didn't see their true enemy behind them. A flash of light and tremendous heat was the only thing they felt.

Night 1 - bigmath: Sokka, Warrior of the Southern Water Tribe (Tracker) has been murdered.

It is now Day 2. Majority Hang is on. Deadline Hang is on. Day 2 deadline will be August 4th, 10 PM Eastern. You may now talk.

kevinmathz wrote:
Hi guys, I'm kevinmathz.

PSA: If you haven't already I highly recommend you read a past game, preferably with a similar setup, like Game 182 for example. Helps out quite a bit

Sometime in the day we should mason code. Example of a mason code: M~ ~~~~n~~e ~~ ~~~i~~~~h~, ~~d ~ ~~ ~ ~~~o~. ~~ ~~r~~e~ ~~ ~d~~~.

When you claim mason and your partner is dead, enter the missing blanks. For example, if I was mason and I sent the above message to zdtsd with the blanks filled in, he could claim mason and enter my blanks as "My username is kevinmathz, and I am a mason. My partner is zdtsd."

This way, when one mason dies and the other is about to be hanged, the other mason can claim and be cleared like that, and lead town. Masons can also soft.

You guys should all do that kind of stuff, called "coding". I urge you all to make good codes in case we ever need it.

Now, some more PR-specific advice:

Town Cop
Your job is to help us find the Mafia. If you exist, that means if you claim, Mafia knows the exact setup, and in either setup, you don't get a report after you claim unless Mafia Roleblocker is dead and Doctor is still alive. As a result, keep from claiming until you at least get a mafia report.

I would suggest investigating unreadable people, to make it not as hard to have to make reads later.

Town Tracker
Your job is to help us find the Mafia. You know there is a Mafia Rolecop. Keep from claiming until you at least get a mafia report, because there is a 50-50 you die the next night. Note that if someone visits two people in one night, they are confirmed scum.

I would suggest investigating unreadable people, to make it not as hard to have to make reads later.

Town Doctor
Your job is to save the power roles and Vanilla Townies. If you claim, you die the next night, so as a result, don't claim until neccessary. In addition, if tracker claims, you know there is a Mafia Rolecop and should always save Tracker. If nobody dies one night, you know you successfully saved whoever you saved (or Mafia is bad and didn't kill, which is unlikely)

Town Friendly Neighbor
Your job is to clear yourself to as many people as you can. You know there must be a Mafia Rolecop, so you should soft that. Also, if people are visited by Friendly Neighbor, they should not make it so obvious until endgame but instead townread the friendly neighbor.

Town Jailkeeper
You know that if there is no kill some night, then the person you jailed is mafia or the kill target (or Mafia is bad and didn't kill, which is unlikely). As a result, you should either protect your townread or jailkeep a scumread. I would do the latter if I was jailkeeper.

Town Mason
Make a good Mason code. Only claim if you are about to be hanged or you have a good reason to do so, e.g. someone else claims PR.

Mafia Goon
Please out yourself and your partner.

Mafia Roleblocker
Here's your strategy. Read it and then proceed to out your partner or pester them to out you.

Mafia Rolecop
Please get feedback'd by the Dark Archon. Thanq


A few more notes:
- If someone claims doctor after the cop is outed and no Roleblocker is alive nor has anyone been saved, they are not necessarily town. They might be goon, due to setups A1 and C1.
- Similarly, if a jailkeeper claims, then if a tracker claims afterward, there is no way to confirm the legitimacy of the claim. NO WAY AT ALL.

My Mason code is ~ ~o~ ~~~ ~o~~~~b~~ m~~~~o~ ~~ ~~~~. M~ ~~~ ~~o~~ ~~~~ ~e~~ ~~ 29, ~~~ ~~ ~~o ~~o~~ ~~~~ ~~~~ ~~~ ~ 9.

Fearing the continued onslaught of the Fire Nation and desperate to stop the madness by any means, the representatives quickly projected their distrust onto one of the prime suspects from the first day. In a fitting parallel, the suspect also denounced the entire lot, predicting that doom would fall upon them all as a result of their actions. With a resigned spirit, they walked voluntarily to the stand, shaking their head the entire time in disgust.

The spirits grimaced as they watched on, knowing that they must let the humans resolve this among themselves, but disappointed in the lack of unity between the members who were supposed to be the representatives of humankind. Regardless, another tribute was being offered to the spirits, and they had agreed to the rules of this game after all. So they opened the floodgates and let pure life essence flow through the tribute's body, weaving in and out of every pore. As the light streamed through the body, they collected all the life force in the body until it all flowed out and returned to the spirit world. Nothing remained but a lifeless husk, which could barely be recognized once the hood fell away.

7 lifeless bodies. 2 smiles, one subtle and one wide, were all that was remaining of this "elite group" to represent humanity. Satisfied with their own conquest, the two Fire Nation members exchanged proud excitements of victory to each other, not sensing the room fill with the presence of spirits until they surrounded the pair in a final judgement call.

United in one voice, the spirits spoke through the minds of every human: "We have seen the horror in your ways, the utter lack of respect you have for each other and for anything in this world. You did not hesitate to murder your own kin, and you have all been found guilty of sin."

Those two last smiles quickly turned to expressions of pure pain, as the life drained from every human being. For what good was conquest and achievement in the end, when all that you've conquered turns to dust before your eyes.

Endgame: Mafia Victory

post_rendered:
Final Mod Notes:

My bad on being so late on the endgame posts, I had a busy weekend when I wasn't able to get time to get on the computer to actually draft anything. Congrats to Mathletesv and mark888 on their victory, although it seemed more like a town loss. Activity during the game was pretty disappointing during Day 1, glad it picked up throughout the game. I'm glad the game didn't end up becoming player-abandoned, that seemed like a genuine possibility at the start.

There's definitely a lot of changes that have happened in the mafia world within the last 8 years that I've needed to try to catch up on, I hope the game didn't feel rushed with the 10/2 day/night cycles and the 48-hour activity prods, I'll try to make sure my next game is more lenient on time. I also see that the Mafia FAQ has become outdated, since there were a lot of acronyms that I missed within the game too. Either way, was a fun time, hope you all enjoyed the game.

Personal MVPs: I'd say that mark888 probably had the best performance of hiding as a scum player, it seemed like everyone read them as town through the game. bigmath was probably my town MVP for best performance during day 1, but that in itself was probably also what got them killed.

Bit disappointed by juliankuang, benjaminsz (who never posted after confirming in PMs), ARay10 from an activity perspective. Felt like asdf334 took up way too much attention during Day 1/2 that really kinda sidetracked the entire group from being able to scumhunt.

#861 was probably the biggest brain post in the entire game, and the only point when I questioned whether there was a chance that mafia might be at-risk, but no one really pursued it further.

Biggest risk of a throw from mafia was probably Mathletesv in Mafia Chat at message #127, suggesting mark888 to do a counterclaim as Friendly Neighbor with Mathletesv as the person they reached out to, especially because this was after snoozingnewt's #861 post. Suggesting a situation where you and your scum buddy are correlated together after just being pointed out by another player would've been the biggest chance for anyone to find both of you.

Anyways, good game, thanks to everyone for playing, and especially for the players who volunteered to replace. Big shout out to correcthorsebatterystaple for volunteering to replace for both benjaminsz and juliankuang but being 2nd to PM me both times.
post_canonical:
[color=#0C27EE]Final Mod Notes:

My bad on being so late on the endgame posts, I had a busy weekend when I wasn't able to get time to get on the computer to actually draft anything. Congrats to Mathletesv and mark888 on their victory, although it seemed more like a town loss. Activity during the game was pretty disappointing during Day 1, glad it picked up throughout the game. I'm glad the game didn't end up becoming player-abandoned, that seemed like a genuine possibility at the start.

There's definitely a lot of changes that have happened in the mafia world within the last 8 years that I've needed to try to catch up on, I hope the game didn't feel rushed with the 10/2 day/night cycles and the 48-hour activity prods, I'll try to make sure my next game is more lenient on time. I also see that the Mafia FAQ has become outdated, since there were a lot of acronyms that I missed within the game too. Either way, was a fun time, hope you all enjoyed the game.

Personal MVPs: I'd say that mark888 probably had the best performance of hiding as a scum player, it seemed like everyone read them as town through the game. bigmath was probably my town MVP for best performance during day 1, but that in itself was probably also what got them killed.

Bit disappointed by juliankuang, benjaminsz (who never posted after confirming in PMs), ARay10 from an activity perspective. Felt like asdf334 took up way too much attention during Day 1/2 that really kinda sidetracked the entire group from being able to scumhunt.

[url=https://artofproblemsolving.com/community/c49h2188745p16955094]#861[/url] was probably the biggest brain post in the entire game, and the only point when I questioned whether there was a chance that mafia might be at-risk, but no one really pursued it further.

Biggest risk of a throw from mafia was probably Mathletesv in Mafia Chat at message #127, suggesting mark888 to do a counterclaim as Friendly Neighbor with Mathletesv as the person they reached out to, especially because this was after snoozingnewt's #861 post. Anyways, good game, thanks to everyone for playing, and especially for the players who volunteered to replace. Big shout out to correcthorsebatterystaple for volunteering to replace for both benjaminsz and juliankuang but being 2nd to PM me both times.[/color]
